{"title":"Daily AI Info (1/2)","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"News"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"要闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"SpaceXAI 开放 Grok 订阅连接 Hermes Agent"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
SpaceXAI 宣布 Grok 订阅现已直接集成至 Hermes Agent 。用户通过 OAuth 授权，即可在 Hermes Agent 内直接调用 Grok 4.3 和 Grok TTS ，并能利用 Grok Imagine 生成图像和视频。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"http://x.ai/news/grok-hermes","text":"http://x.ai/news/grok-hermes"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Anthropic 重置全体用户速率限制"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Anthropic 通过官方开发者账号 ClaudeDevs 宣布，已为全体用户重置 五小时 及 每周 的速率限制。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2055347539923308703","text":"https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2055347539923308703"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"模型发布"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"上海人工智能实验室发布 Intern-S2-Preview 模型"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
上海人工智能实验室发布 35B 科学多模态模型 Intern-S2-Preview 。官方称其核心表现媲美万亿参数规模模型，并首发材料晶体结构生成能力。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://github.com/InternLM/Intern-S1","text":"https://github.com/InternLM/Intern-S1"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Boson AI 推出实时数字人基础模型 Higgs Avatar v1"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Boson AI 推出其实时数字人基础模型 Higgs Avatar v1 的私有预览版。该模型仅需单张静态图片即可生成与语音实时同步的交互面部。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.boson.ai/blog/higgs-avatar-v1","text":"https://www.boson.ai/blog/higgs-avatar-v1"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"开发生态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Zed 的 Zed agent 新增支持 ChatGPT 订阅接入"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
代码编辑器 Zed 宣布用户现已能在其 Zed agent 中直接使用现有的 ChatGPT 订阅。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/zeddotdev/status/2055335727483781624","text":"https://x.com/zeddotdev/status/2055335727483781624"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"阿里发布Qoder 1.0 升级为Agent自主开发工作台"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
阿里 正式发布 Qoder 1.0 ，宣布将该平台从 AI IDE 升级为 Agent 自主开发工作台。用户仅需定义需求， Agent 团队即可自主完成执行与交付。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/iy0MjNjAj2Yb23CSDmx19w","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/iy0MjNjAj2Yb23CSDmx19w"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"通义灵码更名 Qoder CN，升级 Credits 计费并调整价格"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
阿里云 近期宣布将 通义灵码 更名为 Qoder CN ，并全面升级为基于 Credits 的计费体系并调整套餐价格。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.aliyun.com/notice/detail?spm=5176.29412652.J_dNfRwvqdiCuiLSU0gOuJF.5.1c7f19d5LM6SA3&notice-id=118264","text":"https://www.aliyun.com/notice/detail?spm=5176.29412652.J_dNfRwvqdiCuiLSU0gOuJF.5.1c7f19d5LM6SA3¬ice-id=118264"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI Codex 团队正调查 GPT-5.5 表现变差报告"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI Codex 团队正调查 GPT-5.5 对部分用户表现变差的报告。官方称系统运行健康，尚未得出确切结论，将随时更新进展。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/thsottiaux/status/2055316274394300829","text":"https://x.com/thsottiaux/status/2055316274394300829"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"产品应用"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"千问APP与国家药监局信息中心达成合作"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
千问APP 宣布与 国家药监局信息中心 达成合作，接入药品、医疗器械及化妆品权威数据，目前正抓紧消化相关数据以提供用药及产品指导。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/uTXsAc8SrQAiGgHzVVYl0Q","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/uTXsAc8SrQAiGgHzVVYl0Q"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"10. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI 向美国 Pro 用户推出 ChatGPT 个人金融体验预览版"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI 近日向部分美国 Pro 用户推出了 ChatGPT 个人金融体验预览版，该功能允许用户绑定银行、投资账户并基于真实数据获取 AI 建议。后续将下放至 Plus 用户并最终向所有人开放。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/index/personal-finance-chatgpt/","text":"https://openai.com/index/personal-finance-chatgpt/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"技术与洞察"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"11. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Elon Musk 开源 X 平台“For You”信息流最新推荐算法"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Elon Musk 宣布 X 平台最新的" For You "信息流推荐算法已在 GitHub 开源。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://github.com/xai-org/x-algorithm","text":"https://github.com/xai-org/x-algorithm"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"行业动态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"12. "},{"tag":"text","text":"媒体报道 OpenAI 重组高管团队，将整合 ChatGPT 与 Codex 发力 AI Agent"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
据报道， OpenAI 正式任命总裁 Greg Brockman 全面领导产品战略，计划全力投入 AI Agent ，将 ChatGPT 和 Codex 整合为单一平台体验。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/931544/openai-keeps-shuffling-its-executives-in-bid-to-win-ai-agent-battle","text":"https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/931544/openai-keeps-shuffling-its-executives-in-bid-to-win-ai-agent-battle"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"13. "},{"tag":"text","text":"报道称百度设立模型委员会由年轻研究员掌舵"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
据媒体报道， 百度 近日成立 百度模型委员会 作为 大模型 战略最高决策机构。该机构由年轻研究员组成，统筹基础与应用研发部门，以打通技术与产品落地的全链路。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://finance.sina.cn/stock/jdts/2026-05-15/detail-inhxxwvn8138515.d.html?oid=%E7%BA%B8%E9%A3%9E%E6%9C%BAby%E2%94%81%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E8%81%94%E7%B3%AETG:@HHCH8%E6%92%9E%E5%BA%93%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B8%97%E9%80%8F%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B5%B7%E5%A4%96%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E9%80%9A%E9%81%93%E2%94%81%E8%86%9C%E8%9B%8B%E7%99%BD%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%E4%B8%8E%E5%8A%9F%E8%83%BD%E7%9A%84%E7%A0%94%E7%A9%B6%E2%96%B2%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E8%81%94%E7%B3%AETG:@HHCH8%E6%92%9E%E5%BA%93%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B8%97%E9%80%8F%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B5%B7%E5%A4%96%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E9%80%9A%E9%81%93%E2%96%BC%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%B8%AE%E5%8F%A6%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E4%BB%A3%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E5%88%86%E5%BD%95%E6%80%8E%E4%B9%88%E5%BC%84%EF%BC%88%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E8%81%94%E7%B3%AETG:@HHCH8%E6%92%9E%E5%BA%93%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B8%97%E9%80%8F%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B5%B7%E5%A4%96%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E9%80%9A%E9%81%93%EF%BC%8999J3&vt=4","text":"https://finance.sina.cn/stock/jdts/2026-05-15/detail-inhxxwvn8138515.d.html?oid=%E7%BA%B8%E9%A3%9E%E6%9C%BAby%E2%94%81%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E8%81%94%E7%B3%AETG:@HHCH8%E6%92%9E%E5%BA%93%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B8%97%E9%80%8F%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B5%B7%E5%A4%96%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E9%80%9A%E9%81%93%E2%94%81%E8%86%9C%E8%9B%8B%E7%99%BD%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%E4%B8%8E%E5%8A%9F%E8%83%BD%E7%9A%84%E7%A0%94%E7%A9%B6%E2%96%B2%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E8%81%94%E7%B3%AETG:@HHCH8%E6%92%9E%E5%BA%93%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B8%97%E9%80%8F%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B5%B7%E5%A4%96%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E9%80%9A%E9%81%93%E2%96%BC%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%B8%AE%E5%8F%A6%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E4%BB%A3%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E5%88%86%E5%BD%95%E6%80%8E%E4%B9%88%E5%BC%84%EF%BC%88%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E8%81%94%E7%B3%AETG:@HHCH8%E6%92%9E%E5%BA%93%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B8%97%E9%80%8F%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%B5%B7%E5%A4%96%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E9%80%9A%E9%81%93%EF%BC%8999J3&vt=4"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"前瞻与传闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"14. "},{"tag":"text","text":"马斯克透露，参数量共1.5万亿的Grok新模型即将发布"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
马斯克 确认 SpaceX AI 正在研发参数量达 1.5T 的 V9 模型，针对 Blackwells 进行优化，表现显著优于前代，后续还将加入 Cursor 数据进行补充训练。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2055298325994164377","text":"https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2055298325994164377"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Paper"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Know When To Fold 'Em: Token-Efficient LLM Synthetic Data Generation via Multi-Stage In-Flight Rejection"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-16"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
MSIFR提出多阶段飞行中拒绝框架，在LLM文本生成过程中设置中间检查点提前终止低质量样本，无需训练即可降低11%-78%令牌消耗并保持或提升推理准确率。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14062","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14062"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"PREPING: Building Agent Memory without Tasks"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-16"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Preping 提出一种在代理接触目标环境前通过提议器引导的合成练习构建记忆的框架，利用提议器、求解器和验证器协同生成与筛选轨迹，大幅降低部署成本，性能与离线或在线记忆方法相当，在AppWorld等基准上取得竞争力结果。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13880","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13880"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Nexus : An Agentic Framework for Time Series Forecasting"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-16"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Nexus提出了一个多智能体框架，将时间序列预测分解为宏观和微观趋势分析并整合上下文信息，在房地产和股票数据上超越专业模型且输出可解释推理轨迹。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14389","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14389"}]]}

{"title":"Daily AI Info (2/2)","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"ASH: Agents that Self-Hone via Embodied Learning"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-16"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
ASH 提出一种从无标签互联网视频自提升的具身学习系统，通过逆动力学模型和长期记忆，在宝可梦和塞尔达游戏中持续进展，无需奖励设计或专家注释，为解决长程任务提供了可扩展方案。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14211","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14211"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Uncovering the Representation Geometry of Minimal Cores in Overcomplete Reasoning Traces"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-16"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该论文通过定义最小核心概念，分析语言模型冗长推理轨迹的压缩率与必要性集中度，发现平均可移除46%的推理步骤而不改变答案，且最小核心能改善推理表示几何与跨模型迁移，在六个推理基准上验证。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14358","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14358"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Herculean: An Agentic Benchmark for Financial Intelligence"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-16"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Herculean 是一个针对金融智能的代理基准，通过交易、对冲、市场洞察和审计四个 MCP 技能环境评估代理的端到端工作流执行能力，发现当前代理在对冲和审计等需要长期协调和结构化验证的任务上表现较弱。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14355","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14355"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Semantic Feature Segmentation for Interpretable Predictive Maintenance in Complex Systems"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-16"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
面向复杂系统预测性维护，该论文提出基于领域知识的语义特征分割方法，将监测变量划分为规范特征组与残差特征组，并借助时间感知交叉验证中的预测风险指标评估信息集中度，证实规范空间在保持原始语义的同时取得与全特征空间持平的预测性能，用于提升模型可解释性。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14318","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14318"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"When Attention Closes: How LLMs Lose the Thread in Multi-Turn Interaction"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-15"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
论文分析LLM在多轮对话中注意力关闭导致的指令遗忘机制，提出目标可访问比率(GAR)指标和通道转换框架，发现不同架构在注意力消失后的失败模式差异，并通过线性探针以0.99 AUC预测回忆结果，为对话系统稳定性诊断提供了新方法。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12922","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12922"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Intelligence Impact Quotient (IIQ): A Framework for Measuring Organizational AI Impact"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-16"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
提出Intelligence Impact Quotient指标，结合新颖度加权令牌存量、使用频率、任务复杂度和自主性等维度，量化组织中AI系统的集成深度与实际影响。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14455","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14455"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"10. "},{"tag":"text","text":"AI-Generated Slides: Are They Good? Can Students Tell?"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-15"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
本文实证评估了多种生成式AI工具从课程笔记生成教学幻灯片的质量，发现编程助手如Cursor和Claude Code生成的幻灯片最准确完整，并在真实课堂的双盲测试中表明学生无法可靠区分AI与人工幻灯片，但倾向于将低质量归因于AI。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13532","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13532"}]]}
